'use strict'; var test = require('tape'); var semver = require('semver'); var supportsPreserveSymlinks = require('../'); var browser = require('../browser'); test('supportsPreserveSymlinks', function (t) { t.equal(typeof supportsPreserveSymlinks, 'boolean', 'is a boolean'); t.equal(browser, null, 'browser file is `null`'); t.equal( supportsPreserveSymlinks, null, 'in a browser, is null', { skip: typeof window === 'undefined' } ); var expected = semver.satisfies(process.version, '>= 6.2'); t.equal( supportsPreserveSymlinks, expected, 'is true in node v6.2+, false otherwise (actual: ' + supportsPreserveSymlinks + ', expected ' + expected + ')', { skip: typeof window !== 'undefined' } ); t.end(); });
